title: chrysopsis mariana var. floridana
intro: Chrysopsis mariana var. floridana, also known as the Florida Goldenaster, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Chrysopsis mariana var. floridana include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight bacterial infections, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be applied topically to the skin to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
